mapper.select: select user_id, account, phone, email, password_salt, password_hash, enabled from user_account where account = #{account} or phone = #{account} or email = #{account} limit 1
select user_id, account, phone, email, password_salt, password_hash, enabled from user_account where user_id = #{userId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into user_account (account, phone, email, password_salt, password_hash, enabled) values (#{account}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{passwordSalt}, #{passwordHash}, #{enabled})
insert into user_profile (user_id, avatar_url, nickname, verified, verify_status) values (#{userId}, #{avatarUrl}, #{nickname}, #{verified}, #{verifyStatus})
insert into home_user_summary (user_id, verified, nickname) values (#{userId}, 0, #{nickname})
